page.title: Agents
page.subtitle: Manage agent profiles and the catalog (upstream + custom) for this project.

banner.title: Profile-aware pipeline requires specrails-core {{required}}+
banner.body: This project has {{version}}. Run {{command}} inside the project to unlock profile mode. Profiles you create here will still save; they just won't affect the pipeline until core is updated.

templates.title: Agent template library
templates.description: Start from a curated template across engineering, product, science, health, legal, and more. Pick one and open it in the Studio for review and editing before saving.
templates.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, description, tag, or category…
templates.tip: Tip: click a tag pill on any card to filter by that tag.

generate.title: Generate a custom agent
generate.descriptionLabel: Describe what this agent should do
generate.descriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Review Terraform/IaC changes and flag security misconfigurations, excessive IAM permissions, and public S3 buckets before merging. Conservative and terse.
generate.note: Claude will draft a full .md body. You'll review it in the Studio and can edit before saving. This spawns a one-shot claude invocation and can take up to 90 seconds.

empty.title: No agents installed
empty.body: Run {{command}} in this project to install the upstream agents, or create a custom agent now.

sections.customDescription: Your project's custom-*.md files. Use Template / Generate / Blank above to create one.

detail.aiEditTitle: Iteratively refine this agent with AI

toasts.migratedDescription: default profile created from your current agents
toasts.savedWithUntargetedDescription: No routing rule points to: {{agents}}. Add a tag rule or retarget the default rule if you want them to run.

createDialog.title: New profile
createDialog.description: Pick a lowercase kebab-case name (letters, digits, and hyphens).
createDialog.invalidHint: Must start with a letter or digit and contain only lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens.

deleteDialog.title: Delete profile "{{name}}"?
deleteDialog.description: This cannot be undone. Jobs already launched with this profile keep their snapshot; future launches will fall back to the resolution order.

empty.title: No profiles yet
empty.body: Profiles let you save orchestrator + agent + routing combinations and pick one per rail.
empty.migrateExplainer: "Migrate" reads your existing .claude/agents/ frontmatter models and creates a default profile mirroring today's behavior — zero-loss.

usage.title: Profile usage
usage.subtitleEmpty: Jobs launched per profile in the selected window.
usage.subtitle: Jobs launched per profile in the last {{count}} days.

routingRule.addDescription: Add a tag-matched routing rule using lowercase kebab-case tags.
routingRule.editDescription: Update the tags or target agent for this rule.
routingRule.tagsHint: Comma-separated. Use lowercase kebab-case like frontend or api-design.
routingRule.invalidTags_one: Invalid tag: {{tags}}. Tags must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.
routingRule.invalidTags_other: Invalid tags: {{tags}}. Tags must use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.
routingRule.routeToHint: Only agents in this profile's chain can be routing targets.
